text:
check this patch for typos:```from decimal import Decimal

from django.urls import reverse

from moneyed import Money

from cloud.costengine.utils import percent_to_multiplier
from cloud.planning.enums import MainHardwareType
from cloud.planning.models.project import Project
from cloud.products.enums import PurchaseModel
from cloud.shoppingcart.product_tree.enums import ExtraItemCategory, ProductCategory


def test_create_extra_item_on_leasing_project_with_asset_multiplier(
    leasing_contract_with_shopping_cart,
    staff_client,
    product_version_models,
    address,
    inverter_model,
    published_installer_cost_model,
):
    leasing_contract_with_shopping_cart.on_signature()
    project: Project = leasing_contract_with_shopping_cart.project

    assert project.current_shopping_cart
    project.current_shopping_cart.cart_modifications.all().delete()
    project.current_shopping_cart.extra_items.all().delete()
    project.current_shopping_cart.shopping_cart_base_markup.rules.update(
        subscription_asset_value_multiplier=Decimal('1.05')
    )
    old_gross = project.current_shopping_cart.get_product_tree(
        main_purchase_model=PurchaseModel.LEASING
    ).root_node.total_gross_price

    currency = project.current_shopping_cart.currency
    given_price = 100

    response = staff_client.post(
        reverse('shoppingcart:extra-items-edit', urlconf='cloud.urls')
        + f'?shopping_cart_id={project.current_shopping_cart.id}',
        data={
            'category': ExtraItemCategory.ADDITIONAL_WORK_OR_EQUIPMENT.value,
            'description': 'extra work',
            'main_hardware_type': MainHardwareType.PV_SYSTEM.value,
            'hardware-unit_cost_0': 0,
            'hardware-unit_cost_1': currency,
            'hardware-unit_price_0': 0,
            'hardware-unit_price_1': currency,
            'service-unit_cost_0': 0,
            'service-unit_cost_1': currency,
            'service-unit_price_0': given_price,
            'service-unit_price_1': currency,
            'save': True,
        },
    )

    assert response.status_code == 200

    project = Project.objects.get(id=project.id)
    assert project.current_shopping_cart
    new_gross = project.current_shopping_cart.get_product_tree(
        main_purchase_model=PurchaseModel.LEASING
    ).root_node.total_gross_price

    expexted_extra_item_gross = Money(given_price, currency)
    assert round(new_gross, 6) == old_gross + expexted_extra_item_gross

    vat = project.current_shopping_cart.get_vat_percent(
        purchase_model=project.purchase_model, product_category=ProductCategory.PV
    )
    extra_item = project.current_shopping_cart.extra_items.first()

    assert extra_item
    assert extra_item.description == 'extra work'
    assert extra_item.unit_price.amount == round(
        expexted_extra_item_gross.amount / percent_to_multiplier(vat) / Decimal('1.05'), 6
    )```
    
The provided code seems mostly free of typographical errors, but there is a small typo in one of the variable names. The name `expexted_extra_item_gross` should be corrected to `expected_extra_item_gross`. Here is the corrected version of your code:

```python
from decimal import Decimal

from django.urls import reverse

from moneyed import Money

from cloud.costengine.utils import percent_to_multiplier
from cloud.planning.enums import MainHardwareType
from cloud.planning.models.project import Project
from cloud.products.enums import PurchaseModel
from cloud.shoppingcart.product_tree.enums import ExtraItemCategory, ProductCategory


def test_create_extra_item_on_leasing_project_with_asset_multiplier(
    leasing_contract_with_shopping_cart,
    staff_client,
    product_version_models,
    address,
    inverter_model,
    published_installer_cost_model,
):
    leasing_contract_with_shopping_cart.on_signature()
    project: Project = leasing_contract_with_shopping_cart.project

    assert project.current_shopping_cart
    project.current_shopping_cart.cart_modifications.all().delete()
    project.current_shopping_cart.extra_items.all().delete()
    project.current_shopping_cart.shopping_cart_base_markup.rules.update(
        subscription_asset_value_multiplier=Decimal('1.05')
    )
    old_gross = project.current_shopping_cart.get_product_tree(
        main_purchase_model=PurchaseModel.LEASING
    ).root_node.total_gross_price

    currency = project.current_shopping_cart.currency
    given_price = 100

    response = staff_client.post(
        reverse('shoppingcart:extra-items-edit', urlconf='cloud.urls')
        + f'?shopping_cart_id={project.current_shopping_cart.id}',
        data={
            'category': ExtraItemCategory.ADDITIONAL_WORK_OR_EQUIPMENT.value,
            'description': 'extra work',
            'main_hardware_type': MainHardwareType.PV_SYSTEM.value,
            'hardware-unit_cost_0': 0,
            'hardware-unit_cost_1': currency,
            'hardware-unit_price_0': 0,
            'hardware-unit_price_1': currency,
            'service-unit_cost_0': 0,
            'service-unit_cost_1': currency,
            'service-unit_price_0': given_price,
            'service-unit_price_1': currency,
            'save': True,
        },
    )

    assert response.status_code == 200

    project = Project.objects.get(id=project.id)
    assert project.current_shopping_cart
    new_gross = project.current_shopping_cart.get_product_tree(
        main_purchase_model=PurchaseModel.LEASING
    ).root_node.total_gross_price

    expected_extra_item_gross = Money(given_price, currency)
    assert round(new_gross, 6) == old_gross + expected_extra_item_gross

    vat = project.current_shopping_cart.get_vat_percent(
        purchase_model=project.purchase_model, product_category=ProductCategory.PV
    )
    extra_item = project.current_shopping_cart.extra_items.first()

    assert extra_item
    assert extra_item.description == 'extra work'
    assert extra_item.unit_price.amount == round(
        expected_extra_item_gross.amount / percent_to_multiplier(vat) / Decimal('1.05'), 6
    )
```

This corrects the typo from `expexted_extra_item_gross` to `expected_extra_item_gross`.
summary: Creating Extra Item for Leasing Project with Asset Multiplier
